title: Colorful birthday bouquet
summary: A cheerful composition with 2–3 colors and simple seasonal flowers.
steps: Choose one main flower.
Add a second color as an accent.
Fill with greenery and tie the bouquet lower.
warnings: Do not use too many colors if the bouquet should look cohesive.
dontDo: do not mix too many strong scents

title: Birthday — bouquet variants
summary: Fuller plan for a colorful birthday bouquet and social caption.
steps: Start with 3–5 main flowers in one color.
Add 2–3 accent flowers in a warmer or brighter color.
Fill gaps with small flowers or greenery.
Arrange spirally, each stem slightly angled.
Trim stems evenly and tie midway down the stems.
Caption: colorful bouquet for a good day, simple and full of energy.
warnings: Before giving it, check whether the person has allergies to strongly scented flowers.
dontDo: do not overheat the bouquet in a car

title: Soft thank-you bouquet
summary: Calm composition in pastels or white with greenery.
steps: Choose light main flowers.
Add plenty of greenery.
Tie simply without excessive decoration.
warnings: For thanks, elegance works better than exaggeration.
dontDo: do not add very loud wrapping paper

title: Thank you — calm variant
summary: Gratitude bouquet with clear arranging order.
steps: Choose white, cream or pastel flowers.
Place 3 main flowers in a triangle.
Add smaller flowers between them.
Add greenery outside as a soft frame.
Tie with natural ribbon or string.
Caption: simple thank-you bouquet — calm, light and not overdone.
warnings: Avoid red if the bouquet should be neutral thanks.
dontDo: do not make the tone too romantic for formal thanks

title: Warm family bouquet
summary: Friendly bouquet for a family meeting in warm colors.
steps: Choose yellow, pink or orange flowers.
Add soft greenery.
Keep the bouquet low enough for a vase.
warnings: For a table, a lower stable bouquet works best.
dontDo: do not make a bouquet that blocks conversation

title: Family meeting — table bouquet
summary: Lower vase composition for dinner or holiday.
steps: Choose 5–7 seasonal flowers in warm colors.
Remove leaves from the lower stems.
Put tallest flowers in the center and lower ones around.
Add greenery only as a light frame.
Trim stems so the bouquet is not too tall.
Care: change water daily and trim ends after 1–2 days.
warnings: Avoid very strongly scented flowers on the table.
dontDo: do not put leaves in water
do not place bouquet near fruit

title: Home bouquet
summary: Calm decoration with greenery and one flower color.
steps: Choose one flower color.
Add plenty of greenery.
Place loosely in a vase.
warnings: Home decoration does not need to be dense.
dontDo: do not overfill a small vase

title: Home decor — green variant
summary: Vase composition that looks light and stays fresh longer.
steps: Choose a vase and match stem length to its height.
Set greenery first as a light base.
Add 3–5 flowers in one color.
Leave spacing so the bouquet breathes.
Remove leaves under water level.
Care: add fresh water daily and keep away from sun.
warnings: Too dense composition loses freshness faster.
dontDo: do not leave leaves under water
do not place near a radiator

title: Just-because bouquet
summary: Natural light bouquet as a small gesture.
steps: Choose 3–5 simple flowers.
Add greenery or small fillers.
Tie loosely with string.
warnings: This bouquet does not need to look formal.
dontDo: do not make it too heavy

title: No occasion — natural bouquet
summary: Loose bouquet that feels friendly and casual.
steps: Choose flowers of different heights.
Hold the tallest flower first.
Add stems slightly angled.
Place small fillers near the outer edge.
Tie with natural string.
Caption: small bouquet without occasion — just for a nice day.
dontDo: do not squeeze the bouquet too tightly

title: Romantic roses
summary: Simple rose bouquet with calm greenery.
steps: Choose roses in one color.
Add delicate greenery.
Tie simply, without too many extras.
warnings: Match the romantic style to the relationship and occasion.
dontDo: do not use romantic tone for formal thanks

title: Roses — romantic variant
summary: Full rose bouquet plan without over-decoration.
steps: Choose 5, 7 or 9 roses in one color.
Remove leaves from lower stems.
Arrange roses spirally with heads at similar height.
Add light greenery around the outside.
Tie with ribbon matched to rose color.
Care: cut stems at an angle and change water daily.
warnings: Check whether number and color suit the occasion.
dontDo: do not leave thorns on lower stems
do not mix too many extras

title: Simple mixed bouquet
summary: Universal composition with main flower, accent and greenery.
steps: Choose the main flower.
Add a smaller flower or second color.
Close the bouquet with greenery.
dontDo: do not add everything at once

title: Universal bouquet plan
summary: Method for arranging a simple bouquet for most occasions.
steps: Choose occasion and tone: cheerful, calm, home or natural.
Set 1 main color and 1 accent color.
Choose 3–7 flowers and greenery.
Arrange spirally with stems slightly angled.
Trim stems and remove leaves from water section.
Add a short note or caption matching the occasion.
warnings: For allergies and strong scents choose gentler flowers.
dontDo: do not leave leaves in water
do not place bouquet in full sun
